characters.appearance: Young adult female, medium build, fair complexion, blonde hair tied back. She wears glasses.
characters.demeanor: Focused on her task, slightly confused at first, then engaged and willing to learn.

characters.appearance: Animated female avatar with red hair and fair skin.

scenes.supernova_script:
B says: What are you doing? [What are you doing?]
A says: I am cooking my daughter. [I am cooking my daughter.]
B says: What? You are cooking your daughter!? [What? You are cooking your daughter!?]
A says: अरे नहीं, मेरा मतलब है I am making food for my daughter! [Oh no, I mean I am making food for my daughter!]
B says: Oh thank god! ऐसे कहो: I am cooking for my daughter. [Oh thank god! Say it like this: I am cooking for my daughter.]
A says: I am cooking for my daughter. [I am cooking for my daughter.]
B says: How old is your daughter? [How old is your daughter?]
A says: She has 3. [She has 3.]
B says: Say: She is three years old. [Say: She is three years old.]
A says: She is three years old. [She is three years old.]
A says: I have many work today. [I have many work today.]
B says: क्या आपका मतलब है: "I have a lot of work today"? [Do you mean: "I have a lot of work today"?]
A says: I have a lot of work today. मैं अपनी English कैसे improve करूँ? [I have a lot of work today. How can I improve my English?]
B says: रोज़ मुझसे बात करके! मैं Supernova पर आपकी AI tutor हूँ। आप काम करते-करते भी English practice कर सकते हो। बस रोज़ 15 मिनट! [By talking to me every day! I am your AI tutor on Supernova. You can practice English even while working. Just 15 minutes daily!]
A says: ये तो बहुत बढ़िया है, let's start! [This is great, let's start!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a funny, relatable English mistake.
- Demonstrates the AI tutor's real-time correction in a gentle, conversational way.
- Introduces the brand and the core value proposition: practice English daily while doing chores.
